task_1.1.name: Add UserName value object with validation
task_1.1.specific_changes: Create UserName.php in app/Domain/User/ValueObjects/ with readonly class, constructor validation (3-50 chars, alphanumeric+spaces), getValue() method, and proper exceptions
task_1.1.success_criteria: UserName value object created with validation rules enforced
definition_of_done: Proper exceptions thrown for invalid input
task_1.1.contributes_to: Implementing User domain with type-safe value objects

task_1.2.name: Create User entity with factory methods
task_1.2.specific_changes: Create User.php in app/Domain/User/Entities/ with private properties (id, name, email, createdAt, updatedAt), static create() and reconstitute() factory methods, readonly getters, and updateName() method
task_1.2.success_criteria: User entity created following DDD patterns with immutability

task_2.1.name: Create CreateUserCommand readonly DTO
task_2.1.specific_changes: Create CreateUserCommand.php in app/Domain/User/Commands/CreateUser/ as readonly class with public readonly properties (name, email) and constructor
task_2.1.success_criteria: Immutable command DTO created following CQRS pattern
definition_of_done: Readonly class with public readonly properties
